section_name: Work permits for work on state highways
text: Except in connection with the construction, reconstruction, maintenance, or improvement of a state highway, no person shall work on a state highway without a work permit issued by the state commissioner of transportation.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 7
#### Article 33. Misc. Rules
##### § 1220-C — Work permits for work on state highways

Except in connection with the construction, reconstruction, maintenance, or improvement of a state highway, no person shall work on a state highway without a work permit issued by the state commissioner of transportation.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*

subsections.text: Except in connection with the construction, reconstruction, maintenance, or improvement of a state highway, no person shall work on a state highway without a work permit issued by the state commissioner of transportation.
